name: SHOREPOWER TECHNOLOGIES INC.
summary: Shorepower Technologies Inc. (SPEV) is a transportation electrification company that builds, deploys, and operates plug-in stations for electric vehicles, heavy-duty trucks, and refrigerated trailers. It operates the largest heavy-duty focused network of electrified parking spaces (EPS) in North America, with 60 facilities and approximately 1,800 electrified parking spaces at travel centers. Products include Truck Stop Electrification (TSE) pedestals, electric-standby Transport Refrigeration Unit (eTRU) stations, Level 2 EV chargers, and DC fast chargers, targeting fleet operators and truck drivers seeking to reduce diesel fuel consumption and emissions.

products.name: Shorepower TSE Pedestal
products.description: Outdoor stainless steel truck stop electrification station providing power and payment control for up to four vehicles during rest periods.

products.name: eTRU Station
products.description: Electric-standby Transport Refrigeration Unit station allowing refrigerated trailers to run on electricity instead of diesel while stopped or loading.

products.name: Level 2 Charging Station
products.description: Cost-effective Level 2 EV charging station competitive with imported chargers, recently developed for launch.

products.name: DC Fast Charger
products.description: Medium speed, cost-effective DC fast charger recently launched for heavy-duty EV charging applications.

products.name: Cloud-based Payment/Control System
products.description: Proprietary cloud-based back-office payment, control, and reporting system integrated with charging and TSE stations.

products.name: Portable Heaters and Extension Cords
products.description: On-board accessories enabling truck drivers to utilize TSE facilities, including portable heaters and heavy-duty extension cords.
